title: thelypteris glanduligera var. koreana
intro: Thelypteris glanduligera var. koreana, also known as the Korean shield fern, is a variety of plant that belongs to the family Thelypteridaceae and is native to East Asia. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it effective in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Thelypteris glanduligera var. koreana include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or decoctions, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
